mechanism: AI productivity growth of 0.5-1.0pp additional real GDP would increase g, widening the r-g gap in favor of sustainability. Could make large deficits self-funding if financing productivity transformation, potentially preventing fiscal dominance activation entirely.
regime_dependence: Requires sustained, broad-based productivity growth — not just tech sector gains. Timeline and magnitude are the single largest unresolvable uncertainty. No historical precedent for this type of structural break.
